name: com.apple.systempolicy.control
title: System Policy Control
description: The payload that configures the system policy for assessments.

payload.content: Provides a way of enabling System Policy assessment processing. This corresponds to the Gatekeeper UI in the Security pref pane.

payloadkeys.content: If `true`, enables Gatekeeper. If `false`, disables Gatekeeper.

If `true`, enables Gatekeeper's "Mac App Store and identified developers" option.

If `false`, enables Gatekeeper's "Mac App Store" option.

If the value of `EnableAssessment` isn't set to `true`, this key has no effect.
If `false`, prevents Gatekeeper from prompting the user to upload blocked malware to Apple for purposes of improving malware detection.
